title: maxillaria poifolia
intro: Maxillaria poifolia, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its roots and leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Maxillaria poifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Maxillaria poifolia can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, including infusions and decoctions.
